reviews.review_description: The bundle prices are really nice me and my friend bought all three bundles two for 6.99 and one 9.99!

reviews.review_title: The Game Is Starting To Get Worse🫩😔
reviews.review_description: Through Out The Past 5 Months, I’ve Gone Through The 3 Stages Of Fame, Being Popular, Being Hated And Bullied, And Forgotten, In My Honest Opinion, The Mods Should Be On More But Other Than That This Game Is Somewhat Fun But There Is Really Nothing To Do Other Then Tag

As soon as I opened the game I was experiencing an the big bang in front of my eyes. The game felt like smth that people have to see. The forest was big, the community was nice and the game does love money and makes you pay for a hair of eyebrow. The game was an peak 1 in a 100 times 100 times 100 chance. The first glare, my balls flew of. The second look, I became a femboy.

I recommend playing this when either not being scared of loosing your balls or becoming a femboy.

reviews.review_title: May I get mod or try?
reviews.review_description:
My friend put me onto this game and I fell in love with it the moment I loaded in. The movement feels so natural and fun that it never gets old, and every session turns into something different. Me and my cousin are always on VR playing tag, messing around, and just having a good time together. His VR name is goldshrew something something, also known as (LEXX), and we’ve spent countless hours laughing, improving, and meeting new people through this game.
What really makes this game special is the community and how creative the gameplay can be. Whether you’re just chilling, playing tag, or trying to get better at movement, there’s always something to do. I’m on VR a lot and I genuinely care about keeping the game fun and fair for everyone. I respect the rules, help new players when I can, and try to keep positive energy in lobbies.
This game has become one of my favorites because it brings people together and never feels boring. Huge respect to the developers for continuing to improve it and keep it enjoyable. Keep up the great work—this game is something special.

Good

The games movement feels really high quality, and really smooth.
The cosmetics look cool, and pop.
The maps are really good for layouts, and fast movement.
Really good community, for now probably…
Really fun game.



Bad

The swimming is just not good at all.
Not a bunch of cosmetic, and most of them are straight from gorilla tag.
Only two maps. (Not counting the store)
Many of the assets are straight from gorilla tag.
For new players, getting out of forest can be hard.

developer_response.body: Hey! Thanks for leaving a good review that our team can take and use to fix bugs and update the game. I just wanted to say in case you thought we ripped assets from Gorilla tag, all the cosmetics and models in this game have been remade from scratch by me and are not ripped from gorilla tag. Swimming is still being fixed heavily due to the game being in early state and more maps are currently being made as we speak. Anyway if you have any more questions regarding the game, join the discord and make a few suggestions there. Thanks!
